title: My Community Places / Lugares de mi Comunidad
description: A vocabulary pack designed for K-2 ELL newcomer students to learn and identify common places in their community in English and Spanish.

vocabulary.image_prompt: a red brick school building with a playground and children playing
a green park with a swing set, slide, and children playing
a small grocery store with a 'Store' sign and items in the window
a building with a 'Library' sign, shelves of books, and a child reading
a red fire truck parked inside a fire station with a 'Fire Station' sign
a police car parked outside a police station building with a 'Police Station' sign
a hospital building with a red cross symbol and an ambulance nearby
a simple family house with a front door, windows, and a small garden
a building with a 'Restaurant' sign, tables, and people eating inside
a building with a 'Post Office' sign and a blue mailbox outside
a building with a '$' sign or 'Bank' sign on its facade
a bus stop sign with a bench, a yellow school bus arriving

worksheets.instructions_en: Match the English word to the correct picture of the place. Draw a line.
worksheets.instructions_l2: Une la palabra en inglés con la imagen correcta del lugar. Dibuja una línea.

items.image_prompt: a red brick school building with a playground and children playing
a green park with a swing set, slide, and children playing
a small grocery store with a 'Store' sign and items in the window
a red fire truck parked inside a fire station with a 'Fire Station' sign
a hospital building with a red cross symbol and an ambulance nearby
a simple family house with a front door, windows, and a small garden

worksheets.instructions_en: Trace the English words for the community places.
worksheets.instructions_l2: Traza las palabras en inglés para los lugares de la comunidad.

worksheets.instructions_en: Color the pictures of the community places and say their names in English.
worksheets.instructions_l2: Colorea los dibujos de los lugares de la comunidad y di sus nombres en inglés.

items.content: a police car parked outside a police station building
a building with a 'Library' sign, shelves of books
a building with a 'Restaurant' sign and tables
a building with a 'Post Office' sign and a blue mailbox
a building with a '$' sign or 'Bank' sign
a bus stop sign with a bench and a yellow school bus

mini_book.title: My Community Places / Lugares de mi Comunidad

pages.image_prompt: a green park with a swing set

pages.text_l2: Aquí está la estación de bomberos.

pages.image_prompt: a hospital building with a red cross
a child thinking about different community places

teacher_notes.objective: Students will be able to identify and name common community places in English and Spanish, expanding their functional vocabulary for daily life.
teacher_notes.suggested_use: Use the vocabulary cards for flashcard activities and 'I Spy'. Read the mini-book aloud in whole group or small groups. Worksheets can be used for independent practice, homework, or during learning centers. Encourage students to share personal connections to each place.
differentiation_tips: **For emerging ELLs:** Provide sentence frames ('I see the ____.', 'Yo veo el/la ____.') during discussions. Pair students with a strong English speaker or a peer who shares their L2.
**For developing ELLs:** Encourage them to use the words in simple sentences. Ask 'What do you do at the ____?' to prompt more language use.

**For all students:** Incorporate realia or pictures of local community places. Use total physical response (TPR) by acting out activities at each place. Play 'Simon Says' with community places (e.g., 'Simon says go to the park').

answers.2: a green park with a swing set, slide, and children playing

answers.5: a hospital building with a red cross symbol and an ambulance nearby
